attributes.action: Reduce the price of gluten free food in supermarkets and restaurants
attributes.additional_details: No one should have to pay more simply to stay healthy. It’s time to make gluten free living fair, accessible, and affordable for all.
attributes.background:
Introduce price regulations or subsidies for gluten free products
Encourage supermarkets to reduce the cost gap between gluten free and standard items
Ensure restaurants provide gluten free options without unjustified surcharges Support individuals with medical dietary requirements

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Fund vouchers for free from, vegan & gluten free items for people with allergies
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750775
